exceptions.reason: No aria-labelledby or aria-label anywhere -- `title` renders as a plain styled div with no id, and the dialog element carries neither attribute. A screen reader announces "dialog" with no name.
No code moves focus anywhere when the dialog opens -- there is no ref, no autoFocus, no querySelector. Focus stays wherever it already was, normally the control that opened the dialog.
No stored reference to what had focus before open, and no code that restores it on close either.
Nothing constrains Tab inside the dialog -- there is no keydown handler, so Tab and Shift+Tab walk straight past the dialog's edges into the page behind the scrim.
No keydown listener anywhere. The only dismissal path is a mouse click on the backdrop (onClick={onClose} on the outer div) -- a keyboard user has no way to close the dialog with Escape at all.
